title: Ubiquiti UACC-DAC-QSFP28-1M, DAC cable, 100 Gbps, 1m
category: Ubiquiti / Optical networks / DAC and AOC cables / DAC cables
description: The passive DAC cable is used for direct connection of two QSFP28 ports with a link speed of 100 Gbps . It is also compatible with QSFP+ (40 Gbps) ports and is suitable for creating short connections between switches. This cable has a length of 1 m , but is also available in other variants
specsSearch: Optics Format QSFP+, QSFP28 Transmission speed 40 Gbps, 100 Gbps AOC/DAC cable type Passive
